title: Sottayaala Lyrics Puli Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Sottayaala
Singer(s): Shankar Mahadevan, MM Manasi
Movie: Puli
Music: DSP

Sottavaala sottavaala
Sottavaala kuttipola
Sokka vaika vandhirukka sundhari

Rettavaalu rettavaalu
Rettavaalu sittu pola
Sutti aattam aadavandha sundharaa

Vatta vatta pottukaariye
En kannam rendil
Vittu vittu mutham podadi

Getti getti gettikaaraney
Unn kayyil pookum
Mottu mottu mottu poongodi

Neeyaachu naanumaachu
Neththi pottil ichu vechu
Nenju kottil kichu kichu
Panni parka enni paakuraen

Maane thaene mayiley kuiley
Ellam serndhaa nee
Chellam chellam
Thithhikum vellam
Vaa de en mandhaagini

Sottavaala sottavaala
Sottavaala kuttipola
Sokka vaika vandhirukka sundhari

Rettavaalu rettavaalu
Rettavaalu sittu pola
Sutti aattam aadavandha sundharaa

Hey Raaja maarthaandane
Naa macham ulla maanu
Nee mattum dhaane aalu
En thegam engum thaenu
Nee echi pannadhey

Adi seeni singaariye
Nee kaal molacha meenu
Un kaalu rendum thoonu
Un kachukulla thaenu
Nee thappi selladhey

Kannaale karbam seiyadhey
Kannam thottu kannam thottu
Kannam vaikaadhey

Maane thaene mayiley kuiley
Ellam serndhaa nee
Chellam chellam
Thithhikum vellam
Vaa de en mandhaagini

Sottavaala sottavaala
Sottavaala kuttipola
Sokka vaika vandhirukka sundhari

Vaa de chinthaamani
Nee athai petha thennai
Naa vachikuren unnai
Oru ichu koodu munna
Nee etti selladhey

Veera maavendhaney
Nee vetti vecha thaeku
En veththalaiku paakku
Ada oorudhadaa naakku
Nee odi pogaathey

Panthaaley roja panthaaley
Pacha nenja pacha nenja
Patha veikaathey

Maane thaene mayiley kuiley
Ellam serndhaa nee
Chellam chellam
Thithhikum vellam
Naa dhan un mandhaagini

Sottavaala sottavaala
Sottavaala kuttipola
Sokka vaika vandhirukka sundhari

Rettavaalu rettavaalu
Rettavaalu sittu pola
Sutti aattam aadavandha sundharaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sottayaala?

The song Sottayaala is a lively dance track that celebrates joy and festivity, featuring playful lyrics that evoke a sense of fun.

What is the context of this song in the movie Puli?

In Puli, the song is performed during a vibrant celebration scene, highlighting the characters' happiness and camaraderie.

Who are the singers of Sottayaala?

The song is sung by the talented duo Shankar Mahadevan and Manasi MM, known for their energetic performances.

When was Sottayaala released?

Sottayaala was released on September 30, 2015, as part of the Puli soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sottayaala from Puli is an energetic and upbeat dance number that encapsulates the joy of celebration. It features lively lyrics and a catchy melody that encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy the moment. The vibrant collaboration between Shankar Mahadevan and Manasi MM adds a unique charm to the track, making it a favorite for parties and festive occasions. Overall, the song conveys a sense of happiness and camaraderie, perfectly aligning with the celebratory theme of the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sottayaala from Puli is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the festive spirit of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Shankar Mahadevan and Manasi MM, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the infectious energy and catchy beats that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Little one, little one, like a small child, beauty has come to play.
Little one, little one, like a small toy, the beautiful dance has come to play.
Round and round, you spin, my eyes are lost in you, give me a kiss.
Get ready, get ready, with your hands, the flower blooms in your hands.
You are here, I am here, with a smile, my heart is fluttering, I am watching you.
Oh honey, sweet like honey, everything is together, come my dear, the water is flowing, come to me, my beloved.
Little one, little one, like a small child, beauty has come to play.
Little one, little one, like a small toy, the beautiful dance has come to play.
Hey king, I am the one inside, you are the only one, my love is everywhere, don't let it go.
Oh sweet girl, you are like a fish, your legs are both like a feast, don't let go of your sweetness.
Don't do anything wrong, don't touch my eyes, don't let my eyes fall.
Oh honey, sweet like honey, everything is together, come my dear, the water is flowing, I am your beloved.
Little one, little one, like a small child, beauty has come to play.
Come, my wish, you are the sweet nectar, I will keep you, don't let go of your sweetness.
Oh brave one, you are the one who has set me free, don't run away from my sight.
Oh rose, oh rose, green heart, don't let it go.
Oh honey, sweet like honey, everything is together, come my dear, the water is flowing, I am your beloved.
Little one, little one, like a small child, beauty has come to play.
Little one, little one, like a small toy, the beautiful dance has come to play.
